user.title: Set up Kópavogur waste collection
user.description: Enter your address as shown on the Kópavogur waste collection page, for example: Kársnesbraut 21

manual.title: Manual setup
manual.description: Use this if address lookup changes. Location ID is the number used by the pickup API.

error.cannot_resolve: Could not resolve this address. Try the exact address from the Kópavogur page, or use manual setup.
